info.title: Snowball CRM API
info.description: Sprint 9 imports ledger, notifications, audit search, and release-hardening contracts layered onto the verified Sprint 8 rules/workflow foundation.

post.summary: Authenticate and return auth bootstrap context

get.summary: Return current onboarding state and profile snapshot

patch.summary: Confirm the current user profile during onboarding
Persist the selected industry for onboarding

get.summary: List tenant accounts visible to the requester

post.summary: Create a tenant account that defaults to onboarding required
Create a tenant industry configuration version

get.summary: Return homepage hero data and KPI summaries
List clients with Sprint 7 disposition-aware statuses

post.summary: Create client record with server-owned initial lifecycle state

patch.summary: Update editable client profile fields without lifecycle mutation

post.summary: Upload and attach client document metadata
Receive Twilio messaging status and inbound callbacks
Receive SendGrid event webhook delivery callbacks
Attempt a governed client disposition transition

get.summary: List applications for a client workspace
Return one client application detail response

post.summary: Attempt a governed application status transition

patch.summary: Update a draft rule or create a new draft from the latest published version.
Update a draft workflow or create a new draft from the latest published version.

get.summary: Get workflow run detail and append-only logs.

post.summary: Upload a governed import file for staging

get.summary: Return import detail, validation summary, preview rows, and preview errors

post.summary: Queue validation for an uploaded import
Queue commit for a validated import

get.summary: List persistent notifications for the current user

post.summary: Dismiss a persistent notification on a given UI surface

get.summary: Search append-only audit records for the current tenant
